tableGroups.wordCorrectionHint:
WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT strategy):
  Root cause: Table.LeftIndent changed from -9.9pt to -4.5pt between versions.
  Fix: set Table.LeftIndent to -9.9pt (-198 twips).
  Apply ONCE per table — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Note: table has negative indent (intentional margin positioning).

phraseGroups.phraseText: If the required information is provided to and accepted by, the Underwriter on a timely basis, a written

negativeCorrection.wordCorrectionHint: Table 1 (docx-derived), Col 0, Row 0: see tableGroups for correction strategy.

phraseGroups.phraseText: acceptance shall be issued in the form of either a revised binder confirming the terms and conditions for
coverage stated herein and that no additional information is required, or a policy of insurance consistent
with the terms and conditions of this binder. If the required information is provided to the Underwriter on a
timely basis, but the information is not accepted for any reason, the Underwriter expressly reserves the right
to issue a replacement quotation with new terms and conditions, including as to the amount of premium,
and, if such is accepted, issue a replacement binder.

correctionTargets.description: [CELL_PADDING] Reduce LeftPadding on ALL cells in table from 5.4pt → 0pt to cancel +5.4pt drift. Apply once to all rows/cells — NOT per word.
